home.trustedBy: Trusted by leading businesses across the region

productSuite.title: Product Suite
productSuite.description: GoPay is a comprehensive B2B billing and collection ecosystem designed to streamline payment processes, drive cash flow visibility, and ensure regulatory compliance in Saudi Arabia. Below are the key products and their business value:

gopay.title: GoPay - Core Collections Platform
gopay.description: GoPay is the flagship SADAD-integrated solution for issuing invoices and collecting payments across all sectors.

goinvoice.title: GoInvoice – ZATCA-Compliant E-Invoicing
goinvoice.description: GoInvoice enables organizations to issue, archive, and report VAT-compliant invoices in line with ZATCA Phase 1 and 2.

gosplit.title: GoSplit - Multi-Payout Mechanism
gosplit.description: For marketplaces, gig platforms, or commission-based models, GoSplit distributes funds to multiple beneficiaries in real-time.

goonline.title: GoOnline - E-commerce Gateway (via Partnerships)
goonline.description: GoOnline allows merchants to accept digital payments online using a secure and scalable gateway.

gopayPlus.title: GoPay+ - Enterprise Financial Orchestration
gopayPlus.description: GoPay+ is a corporate-grade automation layer that digitizes and unifies receivables, payments, and reconciliation.

security.title: Bank-Level Security
security.description: Your transactions are protected with enterprise-grade encryption and compliance standards

speed.title: Lightning Fast Payments
speed.description: Process payments instantly with our optimized infrastructure

global.title: Global Coverage
global.description: Accept payments in multiple currencies from customers worldwide
